title: Portfolio Gallery
description: Showcase your creative work with a stunning visual portfolio
longDescription: A visually-driven portfolio site with a project grid, individual project pages with image galleries, and an about page. Perfect for designers, photographers, artists, and creative professionals.

questions.question: What kind of work do you want to showcase?
questions.placeholder: I'm a UX designer and I want to show my case studies, wireframes, and final product screenshots...
questions.hint: This determines the layout — image-heavy vs text-heavy projects.

questions.question: What's your name or studio name?
Any special sections you need?
questions.placeholder: Client testimonials, services/pricing page, downloadable resume...
questions.hint: Optional — leave blank for a standard portfolio layout.

styleOptions.title: Clean Gallery
styleOptions.description: White space, large images, minimal chrome. Let the work speak.

styleOptions.title: Bold & Creative
styleOptions.description: Playful layouts, bright accents, creative typography. Stand out.

styleOptions.title: Dark & Cinematic
styleOptions.description: Dark background, dramatic image presentation, film-like quality.

features: Individual project pages with image galleries
About page with your bio and photo
systemPromptHint: You are building a portfolio site. Use Astro with Tailwind CSS. The portfolio should have a home page with a project grid, individual project pages with image galleries, an about page, and a contact page. Focus on visual presentation and letting the work stand out.
